text: Entering this space, I feel a peculiar combination of curiosity and anticipation. The glass wall creates a sense of separation between myself and the vivid, almost theatrical display inside. I am drawn in by the colors and lights, sensing that this is a place dedicated to exploration, both intellectual and sensory. There is a quiet energy here, as if every object and word is inviting me to contemplate the relationship between innovation, observation, and my own presence.
